creator: jfc@mit.edu
text:
Created attachment 248641
screenshot of halt

Remember the classic PC startup message "Keyboard not detected, press F1 to continue"?
Issuing the "halt" command causes the kernel to detach the USB keyboard and then ask me
to "press any key to reboot".  If I press a key nothing happens because the USB keyboard
device is gone.

Please press any key to reboot.
